title: cota samuelssonii
intro: Cota samuelssonii is a plant species, also known as Arctic Cota or Samuelsson's Cota, which belongs to the aster family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cota samuelssonii include relief from menstrual cramps, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall well-being. Cota samuelssonii is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal remedies and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
